ordered_parts.title: The Emergence
ordered_parts.goal: Define intelligence threshold metrics and checks

ordered_parts.title: Evolution
ordered_parts.goal: Introduce specialization, lineage, and guild behaviors

ordered_parts.title: The Real Thing
ordered_parts.goal: Operationalize directed synthetic evolution in running code

ordered_parts.title: Tools All The Way Down
ordered_parts.goal: Make tools measurable, evolvable, and self-selecting

ordered_parts.title: Self-Healing Tools Through Lineage-Aware Pruning
ordered_parts.goal: Detect critical tool failures, prune tainted branches, and auto-regenerate from healthy ancestors

ordered_parts.title: The DiSE Cooker
ordered_parts.goal: Compose and execute real multi-step workflows with adaptive tool selection and recovery

ordered_parts.title: Graduated Apprenticeships
ordered_parts.goal: Run workflows with adaptive supervision that graduates stable flows and re-engages oversight on drift

ordered_parts.title: Untrustworthy Gods
ordered_parts.goal: Introduce trust-verification and defense-in-depth patterns for potentially deceptive model behavior

part_1_core_loop_v1.description: Baseline deterministic loop with policy decision point and enforcement point
